stories.snippet:

    variant="error"
    label="이메일"
    labelRequired
    id="email-error"
    type="email"
    placeholder="hello@example.com"
    defaultValue="invalid-email"
    errorMessage="올바른 이메일 형식을 입력해주세요." />;

stories.name: With Input
Required
Basic Dropdown
With Separator And Danger
stories.snippet:
const WithSeparatorAndDanger = () => (
  <Menu.Dropdown>
    <Menu.DropdownItem left="👤">회원 정보</Menu.DropdownItem>
    <Menu.DropdownItem left="☯">사주 정보 수정</Menu.DropdownItem>
    <Menu.DropdownItem
      left="⚙️"
      right={<Menu.DropdownIcon name="icon-setting-mono" />}
    >
      설정
    </Menu.DropdownItem>
    <Menu.Separator />
    <Menu.DropdownItem danger left="🗑">
      채팅 기록 삭제
    </Menu.DropdownItem>
    <Menu.DropdownItem danger left="↪">
      로그아웃
    </Menu.DropdownItem>
  </Menu.Dropdown>
);
